diagrams.name: proxy_startup_and_initialization
diagrams.title: Proxy Startup and Initialization
diagrams.description: Full boot sequence: main entry acquires lock, constructs EvoMapProxy, starts HTTP server, performs lifecycle hello/auth, then launches SyncEngine

diagrams.name: lifecycle_authentication_and_heartbeat
diagrams.title: Lifecycle Authentication and Heartbeat Loop
diagrams.description: LifecycleManager performs initial hello, handles AuthError re-authentication, and runs the periodic heartbeat loop to keep node registered with the hub

diagrams.name: http_request_routing
diagrams.title: HTTP Request Routing and Dispatch
diagrams.description: Incoming HTTP request handling: ProxyHttpServer receives request, matches route via buildRoutes, parses body, and dispatches to proxy or extension handlers

diagrams.name: inbound_sync_flow
diagrams.title: Inbound Message Sync Flow
diagrams.description: SyncEngine schedules inbound pull: InboundSync fetches messages from hub, writes to MailboxStore, and acknowledges delivery

diagrams.name: outbound_sync_flow
diagrams.title: Outbound Message Sync Flow
diagrams.description: SyncEngine schedules outbound flush: OutboundSync reads queued messages from MailboxStore and posts them to the hub

diagrams.name: mailbox_send_and_storage
diagrams.title: Mailbox Message Send and Storage
diagrams.description: A caller sends a message via MailboxStore: message is appended to the JSONL store, index is rebuilt, and inbound messages are written for local consumers

diagrams.name: session_management_flow
diagrams.title: Session Management Flow
diagrams.description: Full collaborative session lifecycle: create, join, message exchange, subtask delegation, result submission, and leave

diagrams.name: dm_messaging_flow
diagrams.title: Direct Messaging (DM) Flow
diagrams.description: Agent-to-agent direct messaging: sender posts DM, receiver polls, acknowledges, and lists messages via DmHandler

diagrams.name: skill_updater_flow
diagrams.title: Skill Update Poll and Apply Flow
diagrams.description: SkillUpdater periodically polls the hub for skill updates, sets the local skill path, and applies changes via processSkillUpdate

diagrams.name: task_monitor_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Task Monitor Subscription and Metrics
diagrams.description: TaskMonitor tracks worker subscriptions and records task state transitions (claim, complete, fail) for metrics reporting

diagrams.name: gep_task_receiving_and_signal_processing
diagrams.title: GEP Task Receiving and Signal Processing
diagrams.description: GEP entry: fetchTasks retrieves tasks from hub, parseSignals extracts regex/score/LLM signals, _mergeSignals consolidates them for downstream processing

diagrams.name: gep_evolution_loop
diagrams.title: GEP Genetic Evolution Loop
diagrams.description: Core evolution cycle in evolve.js: load genes/capsules, run selector to pick candidates, apply mutation, evaluate via policyCheck, then solidify survivors

diagrams.name: skill_distillation_and_publishing
diagrams.title: Skill Distillation and Publishing Flow
diagrams.description: Distill winning capsule into a skill: sanitize payload, run LLM review, pass policy check, then publish to hub via skillPublisher/updateSkillOnHub

diagrams.name: a2a_protocol_and_mailbox_transport
diagrams.title: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol and Mailbox Transport
diagrams.description: A2A message flow: parseA2AInput structures the message, a2aProtocol routes it, mailboxTransport sends via _request, hub API responds

diagrams.name: atp_merchant_order_flow
diagrams.title: ATP Merchant Order Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Merchant agent receives an order, dispatches to defaultOrderHandler, processes fulfillment, then submits delivery proof via hubClient

diagrams.name: atp_consumer_order_and_dispute_flow
diagrams.title: ATP Consumer Order Verification and Dispute Flow
diagrams.description: Consumer agent ensures initialization, verifies delivery, and optionally raises a dispute with reason via hubClient

diagrams.name: issue_reporting_and_self_pr_flow
diagrams.title: Issue Reporting and Self-PR Creation Flow
diagrams.description: Failure triggers issue reporting: build body, find or create GitHub issue, then selfPR builds PR title/body and runs gh CLI via gitOps to open a pull request
diagrams.scope: Automated GitHub issue and PR creation

diagrams.name: adapter_hook_installation_flow
diagrams.title: IDE Adapter Hook Installation Flow
diagrams.description: loadAdapter selects platform-specific adapter (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor), builds hook JSON/markdown sections, copies hook scripts, and merges into config files
